package.name: agv_sim
package.description: Hardware-free Gazebo Classic simulation of the AGV differential-drive robot (ROS 2 Humble). Reuses the agv_description geometry and the agv_hw_interface controller gains to let a contributor with no robot spawn the AGV, drive it via /cmd_vel and watch odometry. Development / simulation tool only (dev_only) -- it provides physics + a sensor-free drivetrain, never production compute.
